title: Trump administration vows crackdown on Chinese companies ‘exploiting’ AI models made in US
description: The memo arrives at a time when China is challenging U.S. dominance in artificial intelligence.
content:
By DIDI TANG
WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies’ exploitation of U.S. artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the U.S. in the AI rac... [4135 chars]
